About Me

Strategy meets execution

"Also a mom of three lovely kids and my own home decorator." 🏡

I'm an experienced Digital Marketing Strategist and Project Manager with a background spanning Telecommunications, Real Estate, E-Commerce, and Digital Marketing agencies. I've worked with multinational brands, financial firms, beverage companies, and online retailers — always with one goal: measurable growth.

My edge is that I combine creative marketing strategy with technical automation skills — so I don't just plan campaigns, I build the systems that make them run on autopilot.

View My Work → Let's Talk
What I Do

Marketing that
moves the needle

I don't just post content — I build systems and strategies that drive real business growth.

01
Social Media Strategy & Management
Full-stack social media management — content strategy, calendars, graphics, community management, analytics, and influencer partnerships.

02
Email Marketing & Automation
End-to-end email campaigns — welcome flows, abandoned cart, post-purchase sequences. A/B testing, segmentation, and Shopify integration.

03
Funnel & Lead Generation Systems
Marketing funnels that capture, nurture, and convert leads — from landing pages to automated follow-up sequences and CRM pipelines.
GoHighLevelKajabiZapier

Content Creation & Brand Strategy
Visual content, copy, and brand voice strategy. Social graphics, long-form content, blogs, and campaign creative.
CanvaLightroomCopywriting
05
Marketing Operations & Project Management
Systems, SOPs, team coordination, KPI tracking, and cross-team collaboration to keep your marketing engine running smoothly.
ClickUpNotionMonday

Marketing Automation
I use tools like GoHighLevel and Klaviyo to automate your entire customer journey — from first touch to repeat purchase, running 24/7 without manual effort.

How We Work Together

Simple, collaborative process

01
Discovery Call
We get on a call to understand your business, your audience, and what success looks like for you.
02
Strategy & Action Plan
I deliver a detailed, customized marketing strategy with a clear 30-day roadmap tailored to your goals.
03
Review & Alignment
You review and approve the plan. We align on priorities, timelines, and key metrics before I start work.
04
Execute & Scale
I build, launch, and optimize. You focus on your business while I grow your digital presence and pipeline.
